title: Non-resident ownership certificates - Canada.ca
content:
## Non-resident ownership certificates
If you are an agent or another person who pays interest or dividends when bearer coupons or warrants are redeemed for a non-resident, you have to fill out a Non-Resident Ownership form.

## Services and information

### Form NR601, Non-Resident Ownership Certificate – Withholding Tax
Information on filling out the NR601 when tax is withheld

### Form NR602, Non-Resident Ownership Certificate – No Withholding Tax
Information on filling out the NR602 when no tax is withheld

### Distributing the NR601/NR602 to recipients

### Failure to file NR601/NR602
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
